description: sign_sync(backend: &Arc<dyn SigningBackend>, …) only ever borrows the backend — it never clones or stores the Arc. std::thread::scope does not require 'static, so the parameter type can be &dyn SigningBackend. The current signature forces every caller to hold an Arc, blocking use from callers that own a Box<dyn SigningBackend> or a plain reference. Changing to &dyn SigningBackend makes the helper more general and removes an implicit coupling between the helper and the caller's storage strategy.
title: sign_sync takes &Arc where &dyn suffices
